nodes.name: backfill-test.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that starts a RisingWave cluster, runs the backfill test suite using risedev slt, and shuts down the cluster after completion.

nodes.name: backwards-compat-test.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that validates backwards compatibility by spinning up an old RisingWave cluster, creating tables and sinks, then upgrading to the new version and verifying data integrity.

nodes.name: configure_rw
nodes.summary: Configures the risedev environment files for the old and new RisingWave versions to prepare for the backwards compatibility test run.

nodes.name: download_old_connector_artifact
nodes.summary: Downloads the connector node JAR artifact from the old RisingWave release for use in the backwards compatibility test.

nodes.name: setup_old_cluster
nodes.summary: Starts an old-version RisingWave cluster and runs SQL scripts to create tables, materialized views, and sinks before the upgrade.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Orchestrates the backwards compatibility test sequence: configure, set up old cluster, upgrade to new cluster, and verify results.

nodes.name: build-other.sh
nodes.summary: CI script that builds ancillary binaries outside the main RisingWave binary set, such as the sqlsmith fuzzer and other utility tools.

nodes.name: build-simulation.sh
nodes.summary: CI script that compiles RisingWave in the madsim simulation mode used for deterministic integration testing.

nodes.name: build.sh
nodes.summary: Main CI build script that compiles the RisingWave binary and all related tools with the CI-optimized build profile, then uploads artifacts.

nodes.name: check-dylint.sh
nodes.summary: CI script that runs dylint custom lints against the workspace to enforce project-specific Rust code quality rules.

nodes.name: check.sh
nodes.summary: CI linting script that runs Clippy, rustfmt, license header checks, typos, dependency sorts, and other code quality checks.

nodes.name: common.sh
nodes.summary: Shared utility library sourced by most CI scripts, providing functions for artifact download, coverage reporting, test environment setup, connector installation, and log filtering.

nodes.name: generate_and_upload_coverage_report
nodes.summary: Generates LCOV coverage reports from llvm-profdata and uploads them to Codecov with retry logic.

nodes.name: exit_hook
nodes.summary: Bash EXIT trap that collects logs, optionally generates a coverage report, and uploads artifacts on CI failure.

nodes.name: download_and_prepare_rw
nodes.summary: Downloads a RisingWave release artifact from S3/GCS, extracts the binary, and places it in the PATH for use by subsequent test commands.

nodes.name: source_test_env_setup
nodes.summary: Sets up the full source connector test environment including Kafka, Zookeeper, MySQL, Postgres, and other data source containers needed for source integration tests.

nodes.name: filter_stack_trace
nodes.summary: Filters and formats stack traces from RisingWave logs to make CI failure output more readable.

nodes.name: sink_test_env_setup
nodes.summary: Sets up the sink connector test environment by starting required external services (Kafka, Redis, Cassandra, etc.) via Docker Compose.

nodes.name: connector-node-integration-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI script that runs end-to-end integration tests for the Java connector node service, starting the service and running SLT test suites against it.

nodes.name: cron-fuzz-test.sh
nodes.summary: Short CI script that triggers the nightly fuzz testing run via sqlsmith differential testing.

nodes.name: deterministic-e2e-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI script that runs end-to-end SLT tests under the madsim deterministic simulation framework to catch non-deterministic behavior.

nodes.name: deterministic-it-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI script that runs integration tests under the madsim deterministic simulation framework for reproducible fault-injection testing.

nodes.name: deterministic-recovery-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI script that runs recovery and fault-tolerance tests under the madsim deterministic simulation, injecting crashes and verifying correct recovery.

nodes.name: deterministic-unit-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI script that runs unit tests compiled with the madsim simulator for deterministic execution.

nodes.name: doc.sh
nodes.summary: CI script that builds Rust API documentation using `cargo doc` and checks for broken doc links.

nodes.name: docker-hdfs.sh
nodes.summary: CI script that starts a Hadoop HDFS container environment used for testing HDFS-backed storage in RisingWave.

nodes.name: docker-scout-notify.sh
nodes.summary: CI script that sends Docker Scout security scan results to a Slack notification channel after image publication.

nodes.name: docker-scout.sh
nodes.summary: CI script that runs Docker Scout vulnerability scanning on RisingWave container images and outputs CVE reports.

nodes.name: docker.sh
nodes.summary: CI script that builds the RisingWave production Docker image and pushes it to Docker Hub and GitHub Container Registry.

nodes.name: docslt.sh
nodes.summary: CI script that runs documentation SQLLogicTest (docslt) validation to ensure SQL examples in documentation are correct.
